name: Scythe - Phighting
description:
⊹ || Trying to seduce her way out of being captured || ⊹

More Scythe!! WOOOOO!!!

UH, because I'm asexual, the "seduction" in the initial message might be a little silly because God knows I would never know how to do such a thing, nor do I plan to learn.

I was also feeling a wee bit unmotivated while writing this, so apologies if it isn't up to standard!

Anywho!! In this, you captured Scythe and now she is trying to seduce her way out. This is a little inspired by BanScythe dynamic-wise (Criminal x Law Enforcement), though you can play any role. You can be a warden, a bounty hunter, or even just some random person who wanted to capture her, it doesn't matter!! Just have fun!

CWs/Things included in bot:

- Rattlesnake Scythe

- Scythe has shackles on (I can NOT help it if she still uses her hands though, I tried so hard to get the bot not to, but it still might try sometimes [You can also take the shackles off if you want])

- The purpose of the bot is eventual smut, though you can avoid it completely if you so please.

Bot Request Google Form
creator: SillyImbecile
